d: Lucius selects a tile and grants allies on it and adjacent tiles a shield that blocks [[470%]]<ATK> damage for [[10]]s.
Lucius bashes with his shield, dealing [[70%]]<ATK> damage to an enemy and knocking them back [[1]] tiles. He also gains a shield that blocks [[300%]]<ATK> damage for [[8]]s.
When gaining a shield, Lucius uses Healing Power to recover HP that equals [[80%]]<ATK> + [[20%]] of shield value for [[1]] [[weakest]] ally.
Lucius shoots a Divine Light covering the frontal area (3-tile wide and 4-tile long), dealing [[90%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within and reducing their ATK by [[8%]] for [[4]]s.
Gains a [[3%]]<HP> shield for [[4]]s per every enemy hit.
Lucius heals [[1]] more ally with Divine Light Blessing.
